title: Template for Assigned Tasks/To-Dos & Automating Sub Items as Tasks
excerpt: Task/To-Do template that automates adds/connects the parent item + subitems as tasks organized by unassigned, assignee, and due date.

posts.author: MRoush (Morgan Roush)
